purpose: Workbook import/export contract reference for the current file-owned runtime model.
notes: This file documents the intended import/export schema and should not be treated as a live payload source.
System Files owns the complete file structure and token registry at runtime.
Export/import behavior must read from the file-owned structure contract (Defined_Structure) rather than legacy canon.

validation: File_Source_Key must map to an existing System Files row.
Tokens must exist in the file-owned structure; unknown tokens are rejected.
Name token is required for new record creation.
